✦   Signs in the Heavens  ·  Genesis 1:14   ✦

"Let them serve as signs to mark sacred times" — Genesis 1:14

The Blood Moon

& the Eclipse Season of 2026

God's Celestial Signposts

"The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of His hands."

Psalm 19:1  ·  A Message Written in the Sky

✦ The Celestial Sequence ✦

February 17, 2026

Annular Solar Eclipse — "Ring of Fire"

The Moon passes over the Sun, leaving a glowing golden ring over the Southern Hemisphere. The eclipse season begins.

Solar Eclipse

March 3, 2026

Total Lunar Eclipse — The Blood Moon ✦

The Moon glowed a warm copper-red for nearly an hour as Earth's shadow passed over it. Visible across North America, Asia & Australia. The last total lunar eclipse until 2028.

Blood Moon Last Until 2028

March 29, 2026

Partial Solar Eclipse

Just 26 days later, a deep partial solar eclipse (93% coverage) rises at sunrise over northeastern North America, Greenland, Iceland & Europe.

Solar Eclipse

August 12, 2026

Total Solar Eclipse — Over Europe

A total solar eclipse travels over Iceland, Spain & Europe — the first visible over Europe in 27 years. A breathtaking close to this extraordinary year.

Total Solar Eclipse 27-Year Rarity
✦

✦ What God's Word Says ✦

Joel 2:31

"The sun will be turned to darkness and the moon to blood before the great and glorious day of the Lord."

Acts 2:19–20

Peter declares that heavenly signs — including a blood moon — are connected to the last days and the outpouring of God's Spirit.

Luke 21:28

"Stand up and lift up your heads, because your redemption is drawing near." — Words of Jesus.

Revelation 6:12

"The whole moon turned blood red." A powerful heavenly sign foretold in Scripture, now seen with our own eyes.

✦

God's Message Is One of Hope & Awakening

☀

A Call to Look UpThree major eclipses in 6 weeks — God's calendar is on beautiful display in the sky.

🌕

Appointed TimesThe Hebrew calendar runs on the moon. These are God's sacred "moedim" — appointed seasons.

✦

A Rare PatternFour total Blood Moons in 12 months — a near-tetrad historically tied to significant moments.

🕊

Not Fear — ReadinessJesus said "Lift up your heads!" This is a reminder of His faithfulness and love.

📌 Did you know? This Blood Moon completes a series of 4 consecutive total lunar eclipses from March 2025 through March 2026 — a rare pattern called an almost-tetrad. Historically, such patterns have aligned with significant moments in the story of God's people.

"Stand up and lift up your heads,
because your redemption is drawing near."

✦ Luke 21:28 ✦
